sections.heading: Accept Invitations to Join Organizations
sections.body:
The **Invitations** tab allows you to view and accept
pending invitations to Atlas organizations.

To view pending invitations to join organizations:

- In the upper right corner of the Atlas UI, click your
  username to access the Account menu.

- Under Atlas, click Invitations.

To accept an invitation, click **Accept Invite**
for the corresponding invitation.

You can also accept an invitation from the email Atlas sends when
you are first invited to join an organization or project.

sections.heading: Invitation Details
sections.body:
Atlas displays the following information for each invitation:

| Organization    | Name of the organization you are invited to join.                             |
| --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Roles           | User roles this invitation grants on the specified organization and projects. |
| Sent On         | Time that the invitation was sent.                                            |
| Expiration Date | Date that the invitation expires.                                             |
| Actions         | Button to accept the invitation.                                              |

sections.heading: View Outgoing Invitations
sections.body:
